 .\"

 .\"

@@ -363,7 +363,7 @@ numbers and can be given by the 
 option.
 If
 .Fl s
-option is ommited then new size is automatically calculated
+option is omitted then new size is automatically calculated
 to maximum available from given geom
 .Ar geom .
